overview: Optimal Bio specializes in Bioidentical Hormone Replacement Therapy (BHRT) using bioidentical pellets that gradually release hormones into the bloodstream. Treatment plans are personalized based on comprehensive lab work and symptom assessment, combined with guidance on nutrition and lifestyle.
highlights: Comprehensive lab work and symptom assessment
targetAudience: Adults experiencing hormonal imbalance symptoms such as fatigue, brain fog, sleep issues, anxiety, depression, or menopausal and low-testosterone symptoms.
